steps.title: Write the point totals
steps.content: There are $x$ questions worth $2$ points each, so those questions are worth $2x$ points. There are $y$ questions worth $5$ points each, so those questions are worth $5y$ points.

steps.title: Set the total equal to the budget
steps.content:
The drill sheet is worth $90$ points total, so
$$2x+5y=90$$
The answer is D.
